subcategory: 3D rotating cube loader with neon glow effects
use_cases: Display loading state while content fetches from API
Indicate file upload or data processing in progress
Show pending state during user authentication
Use as skeleton placeholder for dashboard widgets
Indicate async operation status in real-time applications
ai_summary: A 3D animated cube loader featuring translucent glass-morphic faces in cyan, purple, and indigo neon colors against a dark backdrop. The cube rotates continuously with a glowing inner energy core that pulses, creating a futuristic loading indicator ideal for SaaS dashboards, dev-tools interfaces, and fintech applications requiring elegant loading states.
